visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a floral sleeveless top and light blue jeans, stands excitedly in front of a FamilyMart convenience store, gesturing with her hands while speaking directly to the camera. (2) Close-up shots show a soft-serve ice cream machine dispensing a brown-colored cream into a purple paper cup, then into a cone, showing the texture of the product. (3) The woman is now outdoors, holding a microphone and a cup of the product, interviewing several different young women in front of the store; the interviewees taste the ice cream and the taro milk drink, nodding and smiling. (4) Multiple quick cuts show the interviewees' reactions and the host holding several ice cream cones at once while promotional text overlays the screen. (5) The final scene shows the host holding a purple taro milk cup, pointing to it and smiling as a series of promotional discount graphics and dates are displayed around her.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 水水灶咖 X Fami!ce. [Logo]: 水水灶咖. (2) [Variety]: 霜淇淋來了!. (3) [Slogan]: 仙~仙~仙~仙草. (4) [Variety]: (口感直接的老觀眾). (5) [Variety]: (問這問題會不會太晚了?). (6) [Variety]: (要不然咧). (7) [Slogan]: 老闆不要看. (8) [Variety]: (莫名覺得很私 XD). (9) [Slogan]: 今日主題: 仙草牛奶(?). (10) [Slogan]: 仙~仙~仙~仙草. (11) [Variety]: 現在脫粉還來的及嗎?. (12) [Variety]: 絕對不是被脅迫 ^^. (13) [Slogan]: 真的是仙草的還原. (14) [Variety]: Q: 綜合 v.s 單口味. (15) [Variety]: 這段發生什麼事. (16) [Slogan]: 是我喜歡的那種. (17) [Slogan]: 仙草+1. (18) [Slogan]: 奶香濃郁 喝得到芋頭丁. (19) [Slogan]: 芋頭牛奶酷繽沙 + 仙~仙~仙~仙草. (20) [Slogan]: 芋頭味超夠. (21) [Slogan]: 很讚耶. (22) [Slogan]: 7/5 - 7/7 隨買跨店取 5 隻只要 188 元. (23) [Slogan]: 7/11-7/13 7/18-7/20 康康五 買一送一. (24) [Slogan]: 7/9 - 7/22 新品嘗鮮價 59 元. (25) [Slogan]: 7/9 - 9/2 酷繽沙全品項 第二件 6 折 還有買 3 送 1!!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host, 6 female interviewees, 1 male interviewee, and some distant passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian female with dark hair styled in a high bun, wearing a white floral ruffled sleeveless top and light blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video takes place at the entrance and interior of a FamilyMart convenience store, as well as on the sidewalk immediately outside with pedestrians and city storefronts visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, cheerful acoustic guitar-driven pop music starts. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice introduces the collaboration between Sui Sui Kitchen and FamilyMart's Fami!ce. (2) Rhythmic 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects punctuate the dialogue. A specific cartoonish 'whoosh' occurs during scene transitions. (3) The host's voice is energetic, with frequent rising intonations as she asks questions. Background chatter and feminine laughter from the interviewees are audible beneath the music. (4) Short bursts of 'sparkle' SFX occur as variety-show text appears on screen. The host maintains a high speech rate throughout, delivering promotional details in the final phase with increased intensity over a steady musical beat.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the new Grass Jelly (Xian Cao) flavored soft-serve and Taro Milk drink collaboration between 'Sui Sui Kitchen' and FamilyMart. The video uses energetic host narration and real-world consumer interviews to validate the product's taste before providing detailed discount information.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product presentation, host endorsement, and on-screen discount pricing for the specific brands mentioned.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly edited social-media native promotional video utilizing fast pacing, variety SFX, and social proof (street interviews) to drive traffic to convenience stores.
